data.title: PARITY Act Could Shape Future of U.S. Crypto Legislation
data.description:
The U.S. Digital Asset Protection, Accountability, Regulation, Innovation, Taxation, and Yield Act (PARITY Act) may become a significant piece of legislation in the crypto sector. According to Foresight News, U.S. Representative Jason Smith, Chairman of the House Ways and Means Committee, emphasized that bipartisan support is essential for advancing digital asset tax legislation. The PARITY Act aims to update tax rules for digital assets, providing a clearer regulatory framework while enhancing investor protection and preventing market manipulation.

Currently, the PARITY Act and the CLARITY Act are considered crucial components in establishing a comprehensive regulatory system for crypto assets in the United States. Earlier this year, Congress released a tax policy discussion draft in March and held a bipartisan roundtable in May to discuss the crypto asset tax structure. The market is closely watching whether the CLARITY Act will be passed by 2026. Analysts believe that if both the CLARITY and PARITY Acts are enacted, along with subsequent rules from the GENIUS Act, the U.S. crypto industry will experience a clearer regulatory environment, further integrating Web3 and DeFi into the mainstream financial system.

data.title: Hyperliquid's Largest Micron Technology Long Position Closes with $8.19M Profit
data.description: A major long position in Micron Technology (MU) on Hyperliquid has been closed, according to Foresight News. The position, valued at $21 million, was entered at $575 and closed at $956, resulting in a profit of approximately $8.19 million.

data.title: U.S. Lawmakers Introduce PARITY Act for Digital Asset Tax Regulation
data.description:
U.S. House Ways and Means Committee Chairman Jason Smith emphasized the necessity of bipartisan support for digital asset tax legislation, stating that without it, related bills will not progress. According to ChainCatcher, Representatives Steven Horsford, Max Miller, Suzan DelBene, and Mike Carey have introduced the "PARITY Act," aimed at updating tax rules for digital assets to provide a clearer regulatory framework, enhance investor protection, and prevent market manipulation.

Representative Steven Horsford noted that the legislation would help ordinary investors participate more safely in the digital asset market and create opportunities for wealth accumulation. Max Miller highlighted that the current U.S. tax code is inadequate for the rapid development of digital assets and modern financial technology. The PARITY Act, along with the ongoing CLARITY Act, is seen as a crucial part of establishing a comprehensive regulatory system for crypto assets in the U.S.

In March, the U.S. Congress released a draft discussion on tax policy, followed by a bipartisan roundtable in May to discuss the crypto asset tax framework. The market is closely watching whether the CLARITY Act will pass by 2026. Analysts suggest that if both the CLARITY and PARITY Acts are enacted, along with subsequent rules from the GENIUS Act, the U.S. crypto industry could see a clearer regulatory environment, further integrating Web3 and DeFi into the mainstream financial system.

data.title: U.S. Defense Secretary Urges Allies to Increase Defense Spending
data.description: U.S. Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth has called on allied and partner nations to raise their defense spending to 3.5% of GDP. According to Jin10, this request aims to bolster collective security and address emerging global threats. The move is part of a broader strategy to ensure that allied nations are adequately prepared to meet current and future defense challenges.

data.title: HyperLiquid Whale Profits Exceed $94 Million
data.description:
A major HyperLiquid investor has reportedly begun cashing out, with cumulative profits from HYPE exceeding $94 million. According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, the investor initially acquired 819,335 HYPE tokens from the HyperLiquid genesis allocation. Subsequently, they purchased an additional 676,798 HYPE tokens for $2.9 million at an average price of $4.29 each.

Eight hours ago, the investor withdrew 500,000 HYPE tokens from HyperLiquid, valued at approximately $33 million. They have since deposited 211,001 HYPE tokens into a centralized exchange (CEX), valued at around $13.82 million. The investor still holds 1,284,955 HYPE tokens, worth approximately $82.62 million.

data.title: Institutional Demand Drives Crypto Market, Not Social Media Timelines
data.description: According to PANews, the true catalyst for the cryptocurrency market is institutional demand, which operates independently of timelines suggested on crypto social media platforms.

data.title: ParaFi Capital Announces Leadership Promotions and New Team Members
data.description: ParaFi Capital has announced several leadership promotions and the addition of new team members. According to PANews, Adrian Uberto has been promoted to President while continuing his roles as Partner and Chief Operating Officer (COO). Anjan Vinod has been elevated to Partner. Additionally, Jeff Park has joined ParaFi as a Partner and Portfolio Manager. Park previously held investment and portfolio management positions at ProCap Financial, Bitwise, Corbin Capital, Harvard Management Company, and Morgan Stanley.

data.title: FBI Seizes $8 Billion in Cryptocurrency in Global Fraud Crackdown
data.description: The FBI, in collaboration with international partners, has seized $8 billion in cryptocurrency as part of a crackdown on an international online investment fraud organization. According to NS3.AI, the operation targeted a criminal group operating in Myanmar, Cambodia, Thailand, and the UAE. Authorities have arrested around 300 suspects and rescued approximately 2,000 victims who were subjected to forced labor and kidnapping.

data.title: Sui Mainnet Halts User Transactions Due to Epoch Change Issue
data.description: Sui has announced on Platform X that its mainnet has stopped accepting user transactions due to an issue during an epoch change. According to ChainCatcher, while validator nodes continue to operate and create system transactions, they are currently unable to process user transactions. The Sui core team is investigating the problem and will provide updates as soon as they are available.

data.title: Crypto Fear & Greed Index Rises to 33, Remains in Fear Stage
data.description: CoinMarketCap's Crypto Fear & Greed Index has increased by one point from yesterday, reaching a level of 33. According to NS3.AI, the index continues to be in the Fear stage on a scale ranging from 0 to 100.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | SPDR Gold Trust Holdings Decrease by 3.426 Tons
data.description: The world's largest gold ETF, SPDR Gold Trust, reported a reduction in its holdings by 3.426 tons. According to Jin10, the current holdings now stand at 1,029.142 tons.

data.title: U.S. Officials Report No New Iran Agreement After Trump Meeting
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump held a meeting in the situation room that lasted approximately two hours, according to senior U.S. government officials. According to Odaily, no new agreement with Iran was reached during this meeting. The Trump administration indicated that they are close to reaching an agreement, but certain issues, including the unfreezing of Iranian funds, are still under discussion.

data.title: Solana Transactions Dominated by Private Market Makers, Raising Transparency Concerns
data.description: According to PANews, Solana's decentralized finance (DeFi) ecosystem is facing scrutiny as private market makers, specifically Prop AMM, dominate transactions. Jupiter, a routing protocol, directs 90% of its order flow to dark pools, which has raised concerns about transparency. This situation has sparked discussions about the original principles of DeFi and the potential trade-offs between cost efficiency and transparency.

data.title: Institutional Investors Hold 18.5% of Bitcoin Supply, Analyst Reports
data.description: Crypto analyst Cam has reported that institutional investors currently possess around 3.88 million BTC, which accounts for 18.5% of Bitcoin's total supply of 21 million. According to NS3.AI, BlackRock's spot Bitcoin ETF, IBIT, is identified as the largest ETF holder, with approximately 811,000 BTC.

data.title: Aave to Launch V4 Protocol on Circle's Arc Blockchain
data.description: Aave is set to introduce its V4 protocol on Arc, Circle's proprietary blockchain. According to NS3.AI, Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire expressed enthusiasm about the integration of Aave V4 into the Arc ecosystem.

data.title: Blockchain and Cryptocurrency Venture Funding Drops Nearly 50% in Q1
data.description: According to NS3.AI, Galaxy reported that venture funding in the blockchain and cryptocurrency sectors reached approximately $4 billion in the first quarter, marking a decline of nearly 50% compared to the previous quarter. The number of deals also decreased by 16%, totaling 355. While larger late-stage funding rounds did not recur, there was an increase in smaller seed and early-stage investments.

data.title: Sentora Highlights Rise in Off-Chain and Hybrid Hacking Incidents
data.description: Sentora has observed a noticeable increase in off-chain and hybrid hacking incidents, despite the majority of DeFi exploits continuing to occur on-chain. According to NS3.AI, the firm noted that phishing attacks or malware can compromise controlling wallets and deplete protocol funds, even after audits have been conducted.

data.title: USDC Treasury Mints 250 Million USDC
data.description: According to Whale Alert, a significant transaction occurred with the minting of 250 million USDC at the USDC Treasury. This development highlights ongoing activities within the stablecoin market, reflecting the demand and utilization of USDC in various financial operations. The minting of such a large amount of USDC could have implications for liquidity and market dynamics, as stablecoins like USDC are often used for trading, lending, and other financial services. The transaction underscores the role of stablecoins in the broader cryptocurrency ecosystem, providing a stable value alternative amidst market volatility.

data.title: Top 3 RWA Tokens for June 2026: Stellar, Chainlink, Ondo
data.description: Stellar (XLM), Chainlink (LINK), and Ondo (ONDO) are the top real-world asset tokens to watch in June 2026, each with distinct market setups. Stellar confirmed a high-volume breakout, reclaiming $0.20, which could lead to further gains if this level holds, according to BeInCrypto. Chainlink, despite a bearish chart, shows strong on-chain accumulation, suggesting potential long-term upside. Ondo experienced a strong rally in May, but rising exchange supply and whale activity indicate caution. Investors should monitor key levels: $0.20 for XLM, $7.38 for LINK, and $0.37 for ONDO.

data.title: Cardano Leaders Urge Support for $2M Singapore Summit Vote
data.description: Cardano founder Charles Hoskinson and Cardano Foundation CEO Frederik Gregaard have publicly endorsed the revised Cardano Summit 2026 proposal, urging delegated representatives to approve a 7.8 million ADA treasury withdrawal for the event in Singapore. According to BeInCrypto, the on-chain vote requires approximately 66.67% support from active DRep stake, with recent snapshots showing yes votes near 65% as the May 29 deadline approached. The proposal seeks to fund a two-day summit on October 5 and 6, with a budget trimmed by 22% and new accountability measures in place.
